sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53514" key="karu/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰρύδιον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάρυον</foreign>, <sense id="n53514.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small nut</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
